title: pulicaria velutina
intro: Pulicaria velutina, also known as Velvet-leaved Fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pulicaria velutina include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional herbal medicine, Pulicaria velutina is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
